series_metadata.series_description: Series includes supporting documentation for final determination of inspection results. Proof of meeting standards under OAC 4761:1-9.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for six months following final determination of licensed HME facility passing the inspection, unless the inspections results lead to the issuance of an Opportunity for Hearing under ORC 119. ; Electronic: Retain for six months following final determination of licensed HME facility passing the inspection, unless the inspections results lead to the issuance of an Opportunity for Hearing under ORC 119., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
